title: athyrium newtonii
intro: Athyrium newtonii, also known as Newton's lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. The health benefits of Athyrium newtonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and support overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
